data-engineering.desc: This skill should be used when the user asks to "design data pipelines",

data-quality.desc: This skill should be used when the user asks to "design a data quality framework",

data-validation.desc: Client-side Zod/Yup schemas. Server-side Cloud Functions validation. Firestore rules validation. End-to-end type safety. [EXPLICIT]

data-migration.desc: CSV/JSON import to Firestore. Batch writes (500/batch). Schema evolution. Rollback procedures. Data transformation scripts. [EXPLICIT]

data-flow-architecture.desc: Firebase real-time sync patterns. Firestore triggers to Cloud Functions event chains. Data pipeline design. [EXPLICIT]
